calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Petitioner Abigail Grace Skinner present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Abigail Nuchi.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
